author: Simon Bezuidenhout
name: Clean Architecture + DDD (.NET)
description: A DDD + Clean Architecture .NET solution: Domain/Application/Infrastructure/Contracts/Api plus Aspire ServiceDefaults/AppHost, with ErrorOr flow control, in-house CQRS dispatch + decorators, EF Core via IApplicationDbContext, JWT auth, OpenAPI 3.1 + Scalar, and NetArchTest architecture tests.
